DP.514.0000:
Are you a fan of the Day-Care
Couple like me?\f
I got hold of something quite useful.\f
It’s the latest Pokétch app from
the Pokétch Company.\f
What’s more, they developed it in
collaboration with the Day Care.\f
Since you’re a fellow fan of the Day
Care, I’m compelled to share this!\f
DP.514.0001:
With that Day-Care Checker, you can
check on the Pokémon that you’ve\r
left with the Day-Care Couple.\f
But I haven’t been able to leave
my Pokémon... So here I stay...
DP.514.0002:
Your bond with your Pokémon will
deepen as you travel together.
